untranslatable_reason: The 'Partial Rise' pattern requires multi-bar trend line detection and pattern recognition (touch lower trend line → rise → return to lower trend line) which cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and the allowed operators. Trend lines must be dynamically fitted to price data, and pattern completion requires sequence-based logic not supported by the available indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using support/resistance levels (s1 as proxy for lower trend line), but this does not capture the true pattern logic: (1) prices must touch a dynamically-fitted lower trend line, (2) prices must rise above it, and (3) prices must return to it. The signal also lacks specificity on entry timing and exit conditions (marked AUTHOR_SILENT). Success rates provided are for bear market context (74-78%) but no bull market data provided. Volume and throwback/pullback percentages also not specified.
